title: Results, Explanations, and Interpretive Guardrails
objective: Turn one owned, guardian-confirmed P006 scientific result into a strict, beginner-readable, downloadable, and accessible four-cell workbench view whose heatmap, nearest-neighbour table, and deterministic classical MDS map remain bound to exact validated distances and explicit interpretation limits.
scope: Capability-authorized result readback with durable receipt, exact byte-count and SHA-256, strict JSON/schema, request, outcome, and guardian-confirmation checks
A closed canonical result-view-v1 contract that excludes raw text, token streams, feature words, fitting vectors, secrets, capabilities, paths, and private ownership identifiers
Complete visibility for the declared 100, 300, 500, and 1000 MFW cells with exact complete, not-enough-features, or failed states
A fixed 500-MFW reading reference and view-only complete-cell selector that cannot rerun, hide, rank, or call a post-result cell best
Distance-matrix heatmap, exact-tie-preserving nearest-neighbour table, and deterministic work-level classical MDS map derived from one selected validated matrix
Semantic-table parity, beginner-first English explanations, panel-specific shows/does-not-show copy, and prohibited-claim lint
A result-only JSON export written before cleanup and published only after input/work verified absence so the lifecycle can honestly report Analysis complete
Desktop, mobile, 320-pixel reflow, keyboard-adjacent, nonblank-chart, payload-canary, console, network, clean-clone, Linux CI, supply-chain, and container evidence
non_goals: Changing P006 Delta mathematics, worker schema, fitted values, distance matrices, or result-validation rules
Selecting an optimum MFW, suppressing unattractive or failed cells, or allowing post-result parameter search
Dendrograms, full Style Over Time maps, group inference, broad glossary, stability labels, confidence, thresholds, or calibration
Raw text, prepared text, token streams, frequency vectors, candidate or selected feature words, server paths, capabilities, secrets, or private identifiers in the browser or download
A complete P012 FAIR run package, archival release, clean rerun, or reproducibility claim
Benchmark accuracy, negative controls, Pinocchio findings, production deployment, host isolation, load, rollback, or Lemmata coexistence evidence

Automatic literary interpretation, authorship proof, authenticity, influence, intention, chronology, quality, ageing, maturation, turning-point, causal, general usability, teachability, FAIR-certification, or publication-readiness claims

acceptance.criterion: One owned result is returned only after capability authorization and exact receipt, digest, byte-count, strict JSON/schema, request, outcome, retained-artifact, and guardian-confirmation checks; every mismatch fails closed.

A strict canonical result-view-v1 maps the reviewed documents and all four declared cells without exposing raw text, token streams, feature words, fitting vectors, secrets, capabilities, paths, or private ownership identifiers.

The overview retains all complete, not-enough-features, and failed cells in declared order; 500 MFW is a fixed non-optimal reference and cell inspection cannot rerun, rank, erase, or substitute results.
Heatmap values, nearest-neighbour rows with exact ties, and deterministic classical MDS coordinates derive only from one selected validated matrix and match their semantic-table labels and numbers.

Every analytical panel explains what it shows and does not show; claim lint rejects confidence, authorship probability or proof, pure style, causal age or maturation, turning-point, and equivalent prohibited language.

A canonical result-only JSON export is created before cleanup and becomes available only after input and work verified absence; the public lifecycle then reports Analysis complete without retaining raw text in the export.

Golden fixtures and browser E2E prove nonblank exact-data charts, keyboard-adjacent semantic tables, no page overflow or incoherent overlap at desktop, mobile, and 320-pixel reflow, no payload leakage, no unexpected external host, and no console error.
Source, schema, provenance, claim-lint, privacy-canary, adversarial result, exact-commit clean-clone, Linux CI, SBOM/dependency/secret, and canonical-container gates pass at full measured coverage.

changed_files: P009 opening prompt, result and guardrail contract, native Ticket, PromptEvent, and start checkpoint
blockers: Full P009 purpose-specific graphics, dendrogram, broad glossary, and Style Over Time output remain outside the minimum Public-alpha slice.
Public-alpha activation still requires the integrated P007 owner walkthrough and minimum P014 deployment gates.
